title: haplopappus hirtellus
intro: Haplopappus hirtellus, also known as the hairy goldenbrush or mountain goldenbrush, is a flowering plant species native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its roots and leaves are used to treat various ailments. The medicinal properties of Haplopappus hirtellus are attributed to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Haplopappus hirtellus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
